text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new year begins, and Copano Rickey's classic
year with it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the second day of January. Still on New Year's
break, I'm taking a stroll by myself when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer! It's time for some
training! Let's get a move on! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
C'mooon. Let's do a little training, at least. The
earlier you start working, the better the wind
flows. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to do a quick run around the track and
then take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Yep, even running a little bit sharpens you
mentally and physically! ♪ Okay...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
May the protection of the Four Guardians be with
us once more this year.
choice_data_list: Rickey, what are the Four Guardians again?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Four Guardians? Oh, well, they're also known
as the "Four Auspicious Beasts."

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Basically, in feng shui, they're the four gods that
watch over each of the cardinal directions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Azure Dragon of the east, the Vermilion Bird
of the south, the White Tiger of the west, and the
Black Tortoise of the north.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And in the center is the Yellow Dragon that rules
over all of them.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When I was really little, I had a dream where I was
drowning, and the Azure Dragon rescued me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's why I believe that the Azure Dragon is my
guardian.
choice_data_list:
Oh, so you have a strong connection to the
Azure Dragon.

Oh, so you have a strong connection to the
Azure Dragon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a god looking out for her, I'm sure Copano
Rickey will be able to keep on running with a
positive attitude this year, too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hm... But it is the new year. I'd really like to bask in the good graces of at least one of the other Guardians as well.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes you've gotta get greedy. ♪ So, how
about we go for a little walk?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's go somewhere we can receive the power of
the Vermilion Bird, White Tiger, or Black
Tortoise!
choice_data_list: Sure. Let's give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After agreeing to her proposal, I begin to think.
Which of the four Guardians should we choose,
and what exactly should we do?
choice_data_list: Let's ride the Vermilion Bird up into the sky.
We should frolic with the White Tiger.

I'd like to challenge the Black Tortoise's
sturdiness.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Into the sky with the Vermilion Bird, huh? If you
want to fly through the sky, I know just the
place! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey Rickey! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Do you copy?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yep, I copy! But fancy seeing you here, Maya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After heading to the airport, we run into Mayano
Top Gun. She's a runner with intuition beyond her
years, and she also loves airplanes.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What're you doing at the airport, Maya?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I came to check out all the planes they've got
here! I'm not sure if you knew this about me, but I
know a whooole lot about planes!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Do you want to come look at them with me,
Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it now. The Vermillion bird must have
shed a feather here, so that it can absorb the
wisdom that resides in this location.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're okay with studying with Maya today,
right? I think we'll learn a lot!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That one there's a state-of-the-art passenger
plane! The seats are laid out in a zigzag pattern
so even more people can fit on board.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! And as for that cargo plane over there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun has a blast telling us all about
the different planes, while Copano Rickey
receives the blessing of the Vermilion Bird's
wisdom.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The White Tiger, huh. ☆ I think I know where we
can find one of those.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yep, the zoo! Hey, there it is! It's so adorable. ♪

text_block_list.name: White Tiger
text_block_list.text: Growwwl...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Maybe when it's calm, it's just like a house cat.
Let's play!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rawr, rawr, tiger! Rawr, rawr, grr?

text_block_list.name: White Tiger
text_block_list.text: Rawr!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Very scratchy!

text_block_list.name: White Tiger
text_block_list.text: Rawr, rawr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After playing with the white tiger to her heart's
content, Copano Rickey looks nice and
rejuvenated.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Black Tortoise's sturdiness? Hm... Nothing
really comes to mind. Do you know anywhere we
could go to take on a challenge?
choice_data_list: I'll show you. Come with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We soon find ourselves at an old-fashioned
martial arts dojo.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Rickey... you seek to learn the Kongo Yaegaki
style's protective arts, yes?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Very well, then. Attack from any angle you like.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer? What's going on?!
choice_data_list: You're getting an introduction to martial arts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki: a martial arts-focused
Umamusume. Her guard must be close to that of
the Black Tortoise's sturdiness.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: All right! Here I go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Time for Rickey's Mega Drill Punch! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smack!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Blows like those I can simply absorb. However...
you are skilled at reading your opponent's
energy.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I imagine you will improve quickly. Since you're
here, would you like to study the Kongo Yaegaki
style a little more?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'd love to! Learning about a historic form of
martial arts seems like it'd help a lot in other
areas too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through her training with Yaeno Muteki, Copano
Rickey learns all kinds of new motions.
